detail.description:
This time, we’re continuing the humorous storytelling and brain-teasing design of the first game, bringing you an even richer and more surprising puzzle-solving experience.

In this brand-new sequel, you'll follow quirky plot lines and make clever use of clues and interactive elements to crack a series of bizarre yet cleverly constructed levels.

Each scene is packed with carefully designed puzzles, unconventional logic, and unexpected twists—making you think outside the box and enjoy a perfect
